summary: Tested Online Users Panel and Friend Request features (iteration 27). Backend: 13/13 tests passed. Frontend: All UI elements found and working. Fixed critical bug: frontend was sending 'friend_id' but backend expected 'user_id' in POST /api/friends/request payload.

issues: Console shows 'Failed to load resource: status 400' - appears to be avatar/resource loading, non-blocking
Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility improvement recommended

critical_code_review_comments: BUG FIXED: Frontend App.js line 127 - Changed 'friend_id' to 'user_id' to match backend FriendRequest model
Online Users button (data-testid='online-users-btn') correctly visible in navbar with badge
Friends button (data-testid='friends-btn') correctly visible in navbar (no hidden class)
Online Users dialog shows 'UTENTI ONLINE' title with user count badge
Bots (CineMaster, FilmGuide, CineNews) correctly shown in BOT section
Real users shown separately, filtered to exclude current user
User profile view has sticky header with 'Amicizia' (Add Friend) and 'Sfida' (Challenge) buttons
Stats grid shows: Film, Incassi, Qualità Media, XP, Premi, Fame
Heartbeat endpoint updates user online status correctly

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all required UI elements found and working)

seed_data_creation: Used existing test users for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Online users panel fully tested. Friend request from profile view working after fix. Heartbeat mechanism working. Users appear in online list after heartbeat within 5 minutes. Bots always visible.

features_tested.GET /api/users/online excludes self: PASSED - Current user excluded from list
features_tested.GET /api/users/{id}/full-profile: PASSED - Returns full profile with stats
features_tested.GET /api/users/{id}/full-profile stats: PASSED - Contains total_films, total_revenue, avg_quality, xp, level, fame, awards_count
features_tested.GET /api/users/{id}/full-profile is_own_: PASSED - Correctly identifies own vs others profile
features_tested.POST /api/friends/request with friend_id: PASSED - Correctly rejects wrong field name (422)
features_tested.Online Users dialog: PASSED - Opens with UTENTI ONLINE title
features_tested.Bots in dialog: PASSED - CineMaster, FilmGuide, CineNews visible in BOT section
features_tested.Profile sticky header: PASSED - Shows user name, Amicizia button, Sfida button
features_tested.Profile stats: PASSED - Shows Film, Incassi, Qualità Media, XP, Premi, Fame

bug_fixed.description: Frontend was sending 'friend_id' but backend FriendRequest model expects 'user_id'
bug_fixed.fix_applied: Changed { friend_id: friendId } to { user_id: friendId }
bug_fixed.verification: Friend request toast 'Richiesta già inviata' appeared confirming API integration works
